pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's target Java version property from 17 to 21.
Upgrade Lombok dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to compile or process annotations correctly on JDK 21 due to internal API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version that supports Java 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions do not support the --release flag or JDK 21 toolchains, causing build failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target configuration with the modern release flag in maven-compiler-plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using source/target with JDK 21 can lead to mismatched bootstrap classpaths and runtime errors; release is the required standard.
